2237510.name: Polarize
2237510.description:
Polarize is an experimental first-person psychological horror game where a simple job turns into a horrific nightmare.

ABOUT

Tasked with the dull job of printing out pictures and placing them into a container, you must perform your duties whilst being paranoid about the nightmarish creatures that await you outside your office. The lights occasionally turn off, and you must venture out of your comfort zone to restore it via a lever right outside.

Outside of your office (and sometimes in), there are nightmarish shadow people that will attempt to kill you. Equip your instant camera and use it to survive, you have no choice.

You need to plan your way to the lever to end the nightmare temporarily.

Or end it entirely...

FEATURES

  • A short, experimental psychological horror game intended to be finished in around an hour.

  • PS1-esque graphics, with unlockable visual effects.

  • Loads of achievements for any completionists out there

  • Lots, and lots of secrets, waiting to be discovered
2237510.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
